settings.title: Founded by a Firefighter
settings.content: Grill Rescue was created and founded by an active South Florida Firefighter.

settings.title: The Grill Rescue Foundation
settings.content: Through the Grill Rescue Foundation, we donate to first responders in need.

settings.title: 24/7 Customer Support
settings.content: Get in contact with us anytime about your order, delivery or anything else.

settings.title: Full 30-Day Guarantee
settings.content: Not 100% satisfisfied? Let us and know an you'll get a full refund.

settings.title: The Grill Rescue Promise
settings.content:
We’re a grilling tools company founded by a firefighter who believes safety should always come first. Just like in the fire service, we’re here to protect what matters most around the grill.
